category_row.row_text: 220 g/m² 100% PES Arof Warp Knit Plain

description_blocks: Arof 100% polyester, 220 g/m² warp knitted fabric for track suit with thermal protection function. Backside of the fabric is fleece.
It is mostly used as sport suits for runners and soldiers.
